description: ProxyKingdom appears to provide a proxy lookup/service API that returns proxy endpoint data and filtering metadata such as protocol, uptime, SSL support, and geolocation. Public documentation pages linked from the spec were not accessible during verification.
summary: ProxyKingdom exposes one documented HTTP API surface, `https://api.proxykingdom.com/`, with a published OpenAPI spec mirrored by APIs.guru; no GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found.
